title: Project: Mayhem
description: A chaotic modpack with over 160 mods, inspired by CrazyCraft.
body:
![The Project: Mayhem logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46539c60c59688a7c08a9b3ee306967898648701.png)

# 📖 About 📖
**Project: Mayhem** is a massive Forge modpack for Minecraft **1.20.1**, loaded with over **160 mods** that transform the game into the ultimate sandbox of destruction, creativity, and absolute randomness.

Want to build the base of your dreams with thousands of block variants? Go for it. Want to blow it all up seconds later with dozens of insanely destructive TNTs? You can. Arm yourself with a ridiculous arsenal of guns and weapons, explore beautifully overhauled biomes and dimensions, tame dragons, survive against mobs from every corner of the modding universe, or just vibe with some nostalgic shaders and classic Faithful textures. You can even scale your player, paint your own paintings, or visit the Aether.

With massive worldgen changes, chaotic combat options, new mobs, new mechanics, and full controller support, **Project: Mayhem** throws structure out the window and hands you pure, unpredictable fun.

This isn’t just modded Minecraft — this is a playground of mayhem.
There are no limits here. Only madness.

# 🛠️ Features 🛠️
## 🎨 Visuals & Immersion 🎨
- **Faithful 32x (Classic)** is enabled by default for that nostalgic look we all grew up with
- **Complementary Unbound Shader** enhances the atmosphere with beautiful lighting and shadows, also tying into that nostalgia
- **AmbientSounds** and the aptly named **"Sounds"** mod make the world feel more alive with enhanced audio
- **Particular** and **Visuality** add extra particle effects, making combat, movement, and the environment feel richer
- **Concentration** adds proper borderless fullscreen support for a smoother experience

## 🕹️ Utilities 🕹️
- Full **controller support** via the Controller Support Mod (you may need to configure it for your controller)
- **Essential Mod** improves multiplayer and adds various handy utilities
- **Resourcify** lets you install shaders and resource packs in-game without leaving Minecraft
- **GraveStone Mod** keeps your items safe when you die — no more painful loot losses
- **Sophisticated Backpacks** offers customizable backpacks to help you carry way more stuff
- **Pehkui** lets you scale your player model however you like
- **Customizable Player Models** lets you design your character exactly how you want — arms, legs, everything
- **Cake's Cosmetics**, **CosmeticArmors**, and **CosmeticWeapons** add loads of visual flair without affecting gameplay
- **Quark** and **Vanilla Refresh** overhaul and expand vanilla systems with quality-of-life tweaks and new mechanics

## 🗺️ Exploration 🗺️
- Terrain is completely overhauled with **Tectonic**, **Biomes O’ Plenty**, and **Dynamic Trees**
- Trees now fall realistically thanks to **FallingTree**
- The **Aether Dimension** brings a nostalgic dream world to life
- **Infinite Dimensions** adds an absurd number of randomized, wild dimensions — inspired by the April Fools update
- The End and Nether have been fully revamped with **Incendium** and **Endless Biomes**
- **YUNG’s mods** and **Towns & Towers** massively improve vanilla structures
- **Limitless** removes the build height cap — go as high as you want

## 🔫 Combat & Creatures 🔫
- Guns galore from **TaCZ** and **Point Blank** — if it shoots, it’s probably here
- **Expanded Combat** and **Better Combat** introduce deeper melee mechanics and tons of new weapons
- Minecraft Dungeons content is added for a bit of RPG spice
- **Lucky TNT Mod** adds dozens of wild and unpredictable TNT variants
- **Burnt** brings realistic fire spread and liquid magma
- **Alex’s Mobs** and **Ice and Fire** fill the world with creatures, both majestic and terrifying
- **All The Trims** lets you apply any armor trim to any armor

## 🏗️ Building 🏗️
- **FramedBlocks** gives you ultimate control over shapes and materials for your builds
- **Rechiseled** adds hundreds of block variants for detailed builds
- **Exline’s Furniture**, **Furniture Beetle**, **Another Furniture**, and **Furniture Expanded** add stylish decor options
- **Joy of Painting** lets you paint your own in-game artwork
- **Create** (with several addons) provides complex machines, automation, and mechanical creativity

# 📝 Credits 📝
This modpack is licensed under an All Rights Reserved license. While I created the modpack, the included mods and resource packs are the property of their respective creators. All credit goes to these talented developers, and any usage rights or restrictions are determined by them. Please refer to the individual mod pages for detailed information on permissions and usage policies.

**Note:** The Classic Faithful 32x pack can be found on the [Faithful website](https://faithfulpack.net/), specifically through [this link](https://faithfulpack.net/classic32x).
